message:
refactor(extensions): extract safe_canonicalize to deduplicate path validation

Two ~40-line blocks in extensions_js.rs performed identical ancestor-walking
canonicalization for the missing-asset fallback (repair branch) and the
non-Linux read validation path. Extract the shared logic into
extensions::safe_canonicalize and call it from both sites, removing ~85
lines of duplication.

Also extract load_persisted_permissions_from() with an explicit path
parameter and add a test verifying that an invalid permissions file
(wrong schema version) is gracefully replaced when a new permission
decision is cached.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
